name: Jira Agent
description: Fetches, searches, validates create input, updates, transitions, comments, assignees, and current-user details on Jira tickets using the configured Jira Cloud base URL and classic or scoped Jira Cloud tokens.

skills.name: Jira Ticket Fetch
skills.description: Looks up tickets such as PROJ-2647 and prepares a downstream summary.

skills.name: Jira Issue Search
skills.description: Searches Jira issues with JQL and returns matching issues with core fields.

skills.name: Jira Issue Create
skills.description: Creates a new Jira issue with project, type, summary, description, and additional fields.

skills.name: Jira Issue Update
skills.description: Updates editable Jira issue fields such as summary, description, labels, or priority.

skills.name: Jira Current User
skills.description: Returns the authenticated Jira user profile for the current credentials.

skills.name: Jira Ticket Transition
skills.description: Changes the status of a Jira ticket (e.g. In Progress, Ready for Sprint).

skills.name: Jira Ticket Assignee
skills.description: Changes or restores the assignee of a Jira ticket.

skills.name: Jira Comment Add
skills.description: Adds a comment to a Jira ticket.

skills.name: Jira Comment Update
skills.description: Updates an existing comment on a Jira ticket.

skills.name: Jira Comment Delete
skills.description: Deletes a comment from a Jira ticket.
